summary: Iteration 5 FINAL POLISH pass. All review-request items verified passing on both backend and frontend. Backend: /api/chat/stream STRICT GROUNDING guardrail returns EXACTLY 'Best to email Shreyshth directly.' for off-topic queries (favorite movie, salary) and still answers correctly for on-site questions (Intel project references Tableau/Python/site selection). /api/contact returns 200 with persisted mongo doc. Frontend: SEO head correct after supervisor restart (title 'Shreyshth Sharma — Finance & Analytics Portfolio', meta description mentions credit research/asset management/investment analytics, og:image=/og-image.png, favicon=/favicon-s.png). Global background SVG rendered with 3 equations ('P = Σ CF...', 'σ² = Σ(x−μ)²/n', 'Y = β₀ + β₁X + ε'), 2 curve paths, 4 dots, masked dot-grid div — opacity 0.06 does NOT reduce readability (hero h1 remains rgb(248,250,252) on rgb(3,7,18)). Content: hero badge shows 'Burtonsville, MD · Washington–Baltimore Area', About Based='Burtonsville, MD', about-relocation='Open to relocation: NYC · Chicago', footer '© 2026 Shreyshth Sharma' (no city), no 'Bloomington, IN' in header/badge/about-based/footer. Education 05, Contact 06 (not 07). Education has 'Markets · Self-Study' card with region 'Fixed Income & Credit' (uppercase-rendered) and no 'CFA Program' card / no '2026' inside that card. Skills 'Finance & Markets' contains 'Fixed Income & Credit' and no 'CFA Curriculum'. Contact shows only Gmail (Shreshth2002@gmail.com), LinkedIn, phone — no contact-link-email2, no 'expiring' text. Resume: hero-view-resume and contact-view-resume both href='/Shreyshth-Sharma-CV.pdf' target='_blank' (HTTP 200 application/pdf). Mobile @390px: no horizontal overflow (scrollW=clientW=390), nav-hamburger opens nav-mobile-menu, UBI slider changes readout (0.80→1.05 elasticity), contact form POST returns 200, all hero buttons visible/functional.

chat_guardrail.favorite_movie_reply: Best to email Shreyshth directly. (exact match)
chat_guardrail.salary_reply: Best to email Shreyshth directly. (exact match)

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend dev-server had served a stale index.html before this run (missing new title/og:image/favicon-s). A supervisorctl restart frontend was required to pick up index.html edits. CRA hot-reload does not detect public/index.html changes — main agent should be aware that any future public/index.html edits require a frontend restart to serve, otherwise SEO regressions can go unnoticed.
seed_data_creation: One /api/contact row via mobile form (auto-cleaned via test_contact.py fixture for TEST_ rows; mobile form row remains).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All final-polish items verified. Backend chatbot guardrail returns exact 'Best to email Shreyshth directly.' for off-topic; test_chat_guardrail.py can serve as regression. If public/index.html is modified again, restart frontend via supervisor to see changes at the public URL.
